title: azarolus
intro: Azarolus plant, also known as the Arbutus unedo, is a small evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the heath family. The Azarolus plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Greek medicine, due to its high content of gallic acid and other organic acids, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Azarolus include its ability to improve digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Azarolus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in herbal supplements and creams for topical use.
